site.tagline: Official smart backpacks for work, travel and daily carry

hero.headline: Smart Carry

manifesto.headline: The right backpack starts with how you move.
manifesto.text: Nayo Smart designs clean, organized backpacks for laptops, documents, travel essentials and everyday movement.

commuter.name: Urban Commute
commuter.tagline: Slim, organized, ready for daily movement.
commuter.description: 18L to 22L backpacks for laptops, trains, bikes and city routines.

travel.name: Transit Travel

personalShopper.headline: Pack Finder
